_comment: UNTESTED skeleton for LM Studio. The schema follows pi-mono ≥0.70 (see README 'Schema notes'). LM Studio's OpenAI-compat server is enabled in the 'Server' tab of the LM Studio app and defaults to http://localhost:1234. Auth is typically not enforced for local LM Studio installs; the apiKey field is set to a literal placeholder so pi-mono's resolver doesn't try to look up an env var. Pre-req: launch LM Studio's local server, load a tool-capable model (e.g. Qwen3 or qwen2.5 family), then run `node scripts/probe-toolcalls.js` with PROBE_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:1234/v1 PROBE_MODEL=<your-model-id> PROBE_API_KEY=lmstudio. Submit your probe verdict per CONTRIBUTING.md to upgrade this entry from 'untested' to a passing matrix row.
